product: Mosaic AI Vector Search reranker Public Preview
tagline: Mosaic AI Vector Search now offers reranking to help improve retrieval quality.
what_it_does: Mosaic AI Vector Search now offers reranking to help improve retrieval quality. For details, see Use the reranker in a query. You can query an AI Search index with the Python SDK, the REST API, or the SQL vector search() function.
why_it_matters: Mosaic AI Vector Search now offers reranking to help improve retrieval quality.
plain_summary: Mosaic AI Vector Search now offers reranking to help improve retrieval quality. For details, see Use the reranker in a query.
key_takeaway: Mosaic AI Vector Search now offers reranking to help improve retrieval quality.
